caption:
FREE Grocery Store in NYC 📍The Polymarket

The Polymarket is located at 137 7th Ave South in the West Village.

Free Grocery Hours:
2pm-5pm on Thursday & Friday(until supplies last)
12pm-3pm on Sunday(until supplies last)

Free Flowers and Valentines Cards:
12pm on Saturday(until supplies last)

Community donation hours:
5pm-6pm Thursday & Friday
3pm-6pm Sunday
